title: erysimum gelidum
intro: Erysimum gelidum, also known as the 'Snow Whitlow Grass', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Erysimum gelidum include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Erysimum gelidum can be prepared as a herbal infusion or salve, often used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
